description: Legal document. Dated: 1482 Seleucid = 1170/71 CE. Concerning the financial rights of the widow of a certain Ṣedaqa. Mentions Ḥārat Zuwayla in New Cairo; [Abū l-Ḥasan(?)] al-Bazzāz; and a woman planning to assemble a trousseau for marriage (...li-tatajahhazī bihim li-man ṭalab zījatik...). Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
